name: Codebase Bible
description: A RAG-based engine that ingests GitHub repositories, analyzes them with AI agents, and produces an interactive onboarding guide for new developers.

methods.name: Ingest Repository
methods.description: Fetches a GitHub repository's file tree, filters boilerplate, and persists repository + file rows. Calls a placeholder chunkAndEmbedFile per file (Step 3 will implement real chunking).
